name: Cookie政策页面布局

config.content.title: Cookie Policy
config.content.body: This Cookie Policy explains how Blackjack Halo uses cookies and similar technologies to deliver site features, remember preferences, and improve performance.
config.toc.items:
What Are Cookies|Cookies are small data files stored on your device when you browse our pages. They help keep experiences faster and more consistent.
Types of Cookies We Use|We use essential cookies for platform features, analytics cookies to understand usage patterns, and preference cookies to remember settings.
Third-Party Cookies|Some pages may use cookies from analytics or media partners to measure performance and improve content delivery.
Managing Cookies|You can control cookies through browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect some functions.
Updates|We may revise this Cookie Policy from time to time. Updates will be posted here with a refreshed effective date.
